untranslatable_reason: Signal requires multi-timeframe confirmation across 4H, daily, and weekly charts. The backtest engine indicators provided are single-timeframe only. Cannot verify 'Trend must be consistent across 4H, daily, and weekly charts' using available indicators.
translation_notes: Translated primary entry conditions using allowed indicators. Exit conditions converted to OR logic (exit on either condition). The signal specifies CONTEXT_DEPENDENT direction but operationally entry is LONG only. Multi-timeframe confirmation requirement cannot be expressed in current schema and requires manual validation or extended engine capability.
